name: map-reduction-meta
title: Meaningfully reducing consumption of meat and animal products is an unsolved problem: A meta-analysis
description: Dataset of randomized controlled trials testing interventions to reduce consumption of meat and animal products (MAP), along with excluded studies, prior reviews, and a supplementary red/processed meat dataset.

sources.title: Green, S. A., Smith, B., & Mathur, M. (2025). Meaningfully reducing consumption of meat and animal products is an unsolved problem: A meta-analysis. Appetite, 108233.

resources.name: map-reduction-data
resources.description: Main analysis dataset. Each row is one intervention arm from an included RCT. Effect sizes (d, var_d, se_d) are computed at runtime by load-data.R and are not stored in the CSV.

fields.name: author
fields.description: First author of the paper

fields.name: year
fields.description: Publication year

fields.name: title
fields.description: Title of the paper

fields.name: doi_or_url
fields.description: DOI or URL of the paper

fields.name: venue
fields.description: Publication source (journal, conference, etc.)

fields.name: source
fields.description: How the study was located

fields.name: intervention_condition
fields.description: Specific intervention coded; useful for multi-intervention studies

fields.name: brief_description
fields.description: Brief summary of the intervention

fields.name: study_num_within_paper
fields.description: Identifier for cluster-robust SEs; references specific study within a paper

fields.name: outcome
fields.description: Dependent variable recorded for analysis

fields.name: n_t_post
fields.description: Post-intervention sample size for treatment group(s)

fields.name: n_c_post
fields.description: Post-intervention sample size for control group

fields.name: n_t_total_pop
fields.description: Total treatment group population (subjects, not clusters)

fields.name: n_c_total_pop
fields.description: Total control group population; divided proportionally when multiple treatments share one control

fields.name: eff_type
fields.description: Type of effect used to calculate Glass's delta

fields.name: u_s_d
fields.description: Unstandardized effect size for Glass's delta calculation

fields.name: ctrl_sd
fields.description: Standard deviation of the outcome in the control group

fields.name: neg_null_pos
fields.description: Direction of effect as reported by authors: negative, null, or positive

fields.name: delay
fields.description: Days between treatment administration and final outcome measurement

fields.name: theory
fields.description: Guiding methodological theory or framework

fields.name: secondary_theory
fields.description: Specific theoretical content (e.g., animal welfare, environmental, health)

fields.name: self_report
fields.description: Whether data were self-reported (Y/N)

fields.name: outcome_category
fields.description: Outcome categorization (e.g., original, amount, servings)

fields.name: cafeteria_or_restaurant_or_store_based
fields.description: Whether the intervention took place in a cafeteria, restaurant, or store (Y/N)

fields.name: leaflet
fields.description: Whether treatment was administered via a leaflet (Y/N)

fields.name: video
fields.description: Whether treatment was administered via a video (Y/N)

fields.name: delivery_method
fields.description: General category of treatment administration method

fields.name: internet
fields.description: Whether treatment was delivered over the internet (Y/N)

fields.name: cluster_assigned
fields.description: Whether treatment was assigned at the cluster level (Y/N)

fields.name: multi_component
fields.description: Whether the treatment was a multi-component intervention (Y/N)

fields.name: delay_post_endline
fields.description: Delay after treatment ended; typically zero for cafeteria studies

fields.name: public_pre_analysis_plan
fields.description: Whether a public pre-analysis plan exists (Y/N)

fields.name: open_data
fields.description: Whether data are publicly available (Y/N)

fields.name: emotional_activation
fields.description: Whether emotional activation is an intended effect of the intervention (Y/N)

fields.name: advocacy_org
fields.description: Whether advocacy organization materials were used (Y/N)

fields.name: country
fields.description: Country or countries where the study took place

fields.name: population
fields.description: Target population

fields.name: age_info_if_given
fields.description: Age group or setting of participants, if specified

fields.name: inclusion_exclusion
fields.description: 0=main dataset, 1=RPM dataset, 2=excluded (RCT issue), 3=excluded (underpowered), 4=excluded (no delay), 5=substitution issue, 6=other

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Additional notes

resources.name: rpmc-data
resources.description: Supplementary dataset of studies targeting red and processed meat consumption specifically.

resources.name: excluded-studies
resources.description: Studies reviewed but not included in the main analysis, with reasons for exclusion.

resources.name: review-of-reviews
resources.description: Prior systematic reviews consulted to identify candidate studies.

resources.name: robustness-data
resources.description: Data for robustness and sensitivity checks.
